title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
